review_history.summary: The mixed-evidence fixture distinguishes approved source intake from candidate/conflict gaps and covers private projection, lint, candidate extraction, promotion holds, archive/advisory limits, and review handoff.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: approved and blocked source-state paths are unambiguous
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: projection/index/log remain private derivative navigation with source-or-gap links
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: contradiction, citation/page-map, extraction, and advisory lint precedes concepts
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: concept and ontology outputs remain cited candidate records with review routes
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: absent delegation blocks canon routes and archive/NotebookLM cannot become authority
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: projection payload, secret, runtime path, golden, and fabricated execution/read risks are gated

no_golden_finding: pass: synthetic claim fragments are input evidence only; no golden projection or candidate output is present.
residual_gaps: No private projection, source read, archive upload, NotebookLM operation, ontology mutation, or review gate was executed.
